2.0.0: A heavy, suffocating air filled the dimly lit room.
2.2.0: The man lay weakly on the bed,
2.2.1: the fabric covering him trembling with his
2.2.2: shallow breaths, as if it might stop moving
2.3.1: I instinctively sensed from that frail body
2.3.2: and pale face that this was what it looked like
2.3.3: when a life was about to burn out.
2.4.0: "You’ll probably have a tough time after this..."
2.5.0: His voice was hoarse and weak, each word sounding
2.5.1: like it drained what little life he had left,
2.5.2: painfully forced out of his throat.
2.6.0: "I know this isn’t something a father should say...  \w[30]
2.6.1: but I still hope you can promise me—"
2.8.0: I stood there in a daze,
2.8.1: unable to process this sudden final message,
2.9.1: and yet I couldn’t focus at all
2.9.2: I could only stare blankly at my father's face
2.9.3: as the light slowly left it.
2.10.1: from now on, treat her as your ○○—
2.11.0: His voice faded like smoke in the wind,
2.11.1: too faint to finish his final words.
2.11.2: He slowly turned his head toward
2.11.3: a shadowed corner of the room.
2.12.0: That corner was shrouded in heavy shadows,
2.12.1: as if it concealed something of great importance.
2.13.0: This man, who was both my father and my master,
2.13.1: took his last breath just like that.
2.13.3: but the light of life had already left them.
2.14.0: Unconsciously, my eyes followed his gaze as well,
